tasks.subject: Task 1: Bound Python Redis pool — cache_service.py + 6 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `init_redis_pool` body with a bounded, keepalive-protected client + add `_ping_safe`. Cover with 6 unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `libs/common-utils/src/common_utils/redis/cache_service.py:18-47`
- Create: `libs/common-utils/tests/test_cache_service.py`

**Verify:** `cd libs/common-utils && pytest tests/test_cache_service.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["libs/common-utils/src/common_utils/redis/cache_service.py","libs/common-utils/tests/test_cache_service.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd libs/common-utils && pytest tests/test_cache_service.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["from_url kwargs include max_connections+keepalive+timeouts+health+name","env vars override defaults","max_connections=0 clamped to 1","_ping_safe swallows exceptions","existing-client guard reuses live + rebuilds dead","6 unit tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Node shared client factory — redisClient.ts + 4 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create side-effect-free factory `createSharedRedisClient` that returns a single named Redis client. 4 unit tests via test seam.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/redisClient.ts`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/redisClient.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test -- src/tests/redisClient.test.ts && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/redisClient.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/redisClient.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test -- src/tests/redisClient.test.ts && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["factory exports createSharedRedisClient","name=crawler-node-{crawlId}","socket.keepAlive=30000 + connectTimeout=5000","error handler -> monitor as 'shared'","side-effect-free module","4 unit tests green","build clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DedupManager accepts injected client + 4 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `DedupManager` constructor accepts `RedisClientType | string`. Inject-client path makes connect/disconnect no-ops; URL form preserved.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DedupManager.ts:4-45`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/DedupManager.shared.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test -- src/tests/DedupManager.shared.test.ts && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DedupManager.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/DedupManager.shared.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test -- src/tests/DedupManager.shared.test.ts && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["constructor: RedisClientType | string","ownsClient flag preserves URL backward-compat","injected client: connect/disconnect no-ops","addUrl works for both paths","build clean","4 unit tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire shared client in main.ts (heartbeat + DedupManager)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the two separate `createClient` calls (heartbeat L361, DedupManager L546) with one shared client via `createSharedRedisClient`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts:5,29,361-488,546-581`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -c 'createClient(' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -c 'createClient(' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["no raw createClient( in main.ts","heartbeat publish uses sharedRedis","DedupManager(sharedRedis,...) no dedup.connect()","dropData path no reconnect","gracefulShutdown closes shared once","process.exit(5) preserved on initial connect fail","build clean + suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: /admin/redis-debug endpoint + 3 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Authenticated FastAPI endpoint returning per-replica pool stats + global CLIENT LIST aggregation.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/admin.py`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/main.py:11,178`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_admin_redis_debug.py`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_admin_redis_debug.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/admin.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/main.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_admin_redis_debug.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_admin_redis_debug.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /admin/redis-debug returns full JSON snapshot","verify_api_key auth dependency","503 when redis_client None","pool_stats failure safe","registered in main.py","3 unit tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: redis_diagnose.sh operator script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shell script mirroring `scale_crawlers.sh`: loads `.env`, runs `redis-cli`. Diagnostic by default; `--apply-timeout` applies server-side idle reap.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh`

**Verify:** `bash -n apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh && head -5 apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh"],"verifyCommand":"bash -n apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh && head -5 apps-microservices/crawler-service/redis_diagnose.sh","acceptanceCriteria":["bash + redis-cli + .env","prints config + INFO clients + addr top 20 + name top 20","--apply-timeout applies CONFIG SET timeout 300 + tcp-keepalive 60 + REWRITE","executable","bash -n clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: docker-compose env passthroughs + CLAUDE.md rollout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface 4 Python env knobs in compose + document new endpoint/script/rollout in crawler-service CLAUDE.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docker-compose.yml:1356-1363`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

**Verify:** `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config --quiet && grep -c 'REDIS_MAX_CONNECTIONS' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docker-compose.yml","apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config --quiet && grep -c 'REDIS_MAX_CONNECTIONS' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md","acceptanceCriteria":["4 env passthroughs in compose","compose config clean","CLAUDE.md Redis Connection Leak Prevention section","table of env knobs","5-step rollout documented","grep ≥ 1"]}
```
